recursive.hirText:
ancestor_path_trans: (ancestor_path grandparent child) <-
      (ancestor_path parent child),
      (child_path parent grandparent)

pbwv_ancestor: (path_begins_with_var child v) <-
      (path_begins_with_var parent v),
      (ancestor_path parent child)

path_assigned_at_ancestor: (path_assigned_at child point) <-
      (path_assigned_at parent point),
      (ancestor_path parent child)

path_moved_at_ancestor: (path_moved_at child point) <-
      (path_moved_at parent point),
      (ancestor_path parent child)

pmioe_cfg: (path_maybe_initialized_on_exit path point2) <-
      (path_maybe_initialized_on_exit path point1),
      (cfg_edge point1 point2),
      (NOT (path_moved_at path point2))

base.hirText:
vmpioe_from_path: (var_maybe_partly_initialized_on_exit vr point) <-
      (path_maybe_initialized_on_exit path point),
      (path_begins_with_var path vr)

vmpie_from_exit: (var_maybe_partly_initialized_on_entry vr point2) <-
      (var_maybe_partly_initialized_on_exit vr point1),
      (cfg_edge point1 point2)

vdle_dropped: (var_drop_live_on_entry vr point) <-
      (var_dropped_at vr point),
      (var_maybe_partly_initialized_on_entry vr point)

recursive.hirText:
vdle_cfg: (var_drop_live_on_entry v src) <-
      (var_drop_live_on_entry v tgt),
      (cfg_edge src tgt),
      (NOT (var_defined_at v src)),
      (var_maybe_partly_initialized_on_exit v src)

vle_cfg: (var_live_on_entry vr point1) <-
      (var_live_on_entry vr point2),
      (cfg_edge point1 point2),
      (NOT (var_defined_at vr point1))

base.hirText:
ole_drop: (origin_live_on_entry origin point) <-
      (var_drop_live_on_entry vr point),
      (drop_of_var_derefs_origin vr origin)

ole_use: (origin_live_on_entry origin point) <-
      (var_live_on_entry vr point),
      (use_of_var_derefs_origin vr origin)

subset_base_rule: (subset origin1 origin2 point) <-
      (subset_base origin1 origin2 point)

recursive.hirText:
subset_trans: (subset origin1 origin3 point) <-
      (subset origin1 origin2 point),
      (subset_base origin2 origin3 point),
      (FILTER return origin1 != origin3;)

subset_cfg: (subset origin1 origin2 point2) <-
      (subset origin1 origin2 point1),
      (cfg_edge point1 point2),
      (origin_live_on_entry origin1 point2),
      (origin_live_on_entry origin2 point2)

base.hirText:
ocle_issued: (origin_contains_loan_on_entry origin loan point) <-
      (loan_issued_at loan origin point)

recursive.hirText:
ocle_subset: (origin_contains_loan_on_entry origin2 loan point) <-
      (origin_contains_loan_on_entry origin1 loan point),
      (subset origin1 origin2 point)

ocle_cfg: (origin_contains_loan_on_entry origin loan point2) <-
      (origin_contains_loan_on_entry origin loan point1),
      (cfg_edge point1 point2),
      (NOT (loan_killed_at loan point1)),
      (origin_live_on_entry origin point2)

kps_transitive: (known_placeholder_subset x z) <-
      (known_placeholder_subset x y),
      (known_placeholder_subset y z)

kps_transitive: (known_placeholder_subset x z) <-
      (known_placeholder_subset x y),
      (known_placeholder_subset y z)

base.hirText:
loan_live_at_rule: (loan_live_at loan point) <-
      (origin_contains_loan_on_entry origin loan point),
      (origin_live_on_entry origin point)

errors_rule: (errors loan point) <-
      (loan_invalidated_at loan point),
      (loan_live_at loan point)

subset_error_rule: (subset_error origin1 origin2 point) <-
      (subset origin1 origin2 point),
      (placeholder_origin origin1),
      (placeholder_origin origin2),
      (NOT (known_placeholder_subset origin1 origin2)),
      (FILTER return origin1 != origin2;)

recursive.hirText:
path_accessed_at_ancestor: (path_accessed_at child point) <-
      (path_accessed_at parent point),
      (ancestor_path parent child)

pmuoe_cfg: (path_maybe_uninitialized_on_exit path point2) <-
      (path_maybe_uninitialized_on_exit path point1),
      (cfg_edge point1 point2),
      (NOT (path_assigned_at path point2))

base.hirText:
move_error_rule: (move_error path tgt) <-
      (path_maybe_uninitialized_on_exit path src),
      (cfg_edge src tgt)

hirSExpr:
(hir-program
(stratum 0 simple

  :head (cfg_node(point1))
  :body (cfg_edge(point1, _gen1):@[0, 1])
)
  (base-variant :name cfg_node_from_edge_dst
  :var-order @["_gen2", "point2"]
  :clause-order @[0]
  :head (cfg_node(point2))
  :body (cfg_edge(_gen2, point2):@[0, 1])
)
)
